name: Grilled Peaches with Berry Sauce
recipeIngredient: 2 medium Fresh Peaches, Pitted and Halved
recipeInstructions:
1. In a blender or food processor, process raspberries and lemon juice until pureed. Strain through a fine-mesh sieve to remove seeds, then cover and chill.
2. Place peach halves on a large piece of heavy-duty foil (approximately 18 x 12 inches), cut side up.
3. Combine brown sugar and cinnamon; sprinkle the mixture into the centers of each peach half. Sprinkle with vanilla extract.
4. Dot each peach with butter.
5. Fold the sides of the foil over the peaches, then seal securely.
6. Grill over medium-hot coals for 15 minutes or until heated through.
7. To serve, spoon the raspberry sauce over the grilled peaches.
Yield: 4 servings
